data.description:
## What
Replace hardcoded `.tickets-tracker` worktree/symlink-dir literals with `tracker_dir()`
(or its basename) so a custom dir is created, symlinked, and gitignored correctly.

Call sites in `src/rebar/_commands/init.py`:
- line 152: dir creation `os.path.join(repo, ".tickets-tracker")`.
- line 199: the git `_exclude(...)` it writes — must use the resolved basename so a custom
  dir is auto-gitignored.
- line 418: the worktree-path resolver (`.../<main worktree>/.tickets-tracker`).
- lines 461-469: symlink name at the repo root.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `init` uses `tracker_dir()`/its basename for dir creation, symlink, and exclude.
- [ ] A custom `tracker.dir` is created, symlinked at the repo root, and added to git excludes.
- [ ] Default `.tickets-tracker` behavior is byte-for-byte unchanged.

## Files
- `src/rebar/_commands/init.py`

## Depends on
- Child 2 (canonical `tracker_dir()` resolver).
data.title: migrate worktree-dir call sites in init (creation/symlink/exclude) to tracker_dir()
